functions.funcC: s32 SA2_LABEL(sub_80856DC)(s32 a, s32 b, s32 c) { return (a * 7 + b * 6 - c) / 12; }
s32 SA2_LABEL(sub_8085714)(s32 a, s32 b, s32 c) { return ((a + b * 8) - c) >> 3; }
s32 SA2_LABEL(sub_8085758)(s32 a, s32 b) { return b - a; }

functions.note: Div() resolves to an inline macro (int division) — soft-div idiom.

functions.funcC: s32 SA2_LABEL(sub_80856F8)(s32 a, s32 b, s32 c) { return ((b * 6 - a) + c * 7) / 12; }
s32 SA2_LABEL(sub_8085720)(s32 a, s32 b, s32 c) { return ((b * 8 - a) + c) >> 3; }
